question.text: Under Section 15A of the SEBI Act, what is the minimum penalty for failure to furnish any document, return, or report to SEBI?

answer.text: Not less than five lakh rupees
Not less than one lakh rupees
Not less than ten lakh rupees
Not less than fifty thousand rupees

explanation.text: **The Logic:** Section 15A prescribes a minimum penalty of not less than one lakh rupees for failure to furnish documents, returns, or reports to SEBI. **The Trap:** Five lakh rupees is the minimum penalty under Section 15HA (fraudulent trade practices), not Section 15A. **Cross-Exam Context:** Penalty amounts under various sections are frequently tested in NISM Series III-A and III-B. **Distributor's Pro-Tip:** The one lakh rupee minimum applies per day during which the failure continues, so delays can quickly compound the penalty.
